title: Infected Flesh
description: "Infected Flesh" item to turn villagers into zombie villagers
body:
Small mod that add the Infected Flesh item, an item that can be used to transform villagers into zombie villagers without the need for a zombie!

I wouldn't recommend eating it...

## How to use

Just right click with the Infected Flesh in hand on a normal villager to turn it into a zombie villager.

## Crafting Recipe

You can craft the Infected Flesh with:
- 6 Rotten Flesh
- 2 Fermented Spider Eye
- 1 Poisonous Potato

![Infected Flesh Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c50c7553c73bd29f705d54fb20d941e047514d90.png)
